title: Parallel structure

questions.question_content: **Choose the sentence that maintains a parallel structure throughout.**

choices.label: A
choices.content: The shepherd chased the sheep through the valley, along the river, and over the hill.

choices.label: B
choices.content: The shepherd chased the sheep through the valley, chased the sheep along the river, and over the hill.

choices.label: C
choices.content: The shepherd chased the sheep through the valley, along the river, and followed them over the hill.

note: KA serves 1/4 questions to anonymous users. Passage and sample question captured for skeleton generation.
